en: A: Is ljavaus at home?
She’s at home, please come in.
A: May I ask if Ljavaus is at home?

ch: B:她不在，請問你有什麼事?
en: B: She’s not here, what can I do for you?
B: Who is it?

ab: vuvu, ti pales aken suqeljevi a paljing.
en: A: Grandpa, I’m pales please open the door.
B: Who is it?

ab: patagaw, ti pales aken, muri kivangavang aken tjanusun.
en: A:patagaw, I’m pales, I’ve come to play with you.

ab: cuacuay anga itjen a inika mecevang.
en: A: Long time no see.

ab: ui lja! nasinglit aken tjanusun. pai kelju pasasingelingeliti.
ch: B:是啊!我很想念你。快來聊天吧!
en: B:Yeah! I miss you so much. Come on, let’s chat!
B: Please sit down and have some tea.
A: Thank you.
B: Please have some tea.

ab: u! sanguaq aravc a nu quciya.
en: A: Your tea is delicious.
B: Let’s eat fruit!

ab: ui! napesanguaq nutjapacunan aicu a kudamunu.
ch: B:好喔!這些水果看起來很美味。
en: A: Yes! These fruits look delicious.
B: How is the fruit?
A:Yes, it’s really delicious.

ab: nakemesa anga ti kina ta kaiven, kelju kanu!
ch: A:媽媽煮好晚餐了，快來吃吧!
en: B: Mom has cooked dinner, come and eat!
A: Okay, I’ll go wash my hands.

ab: kanu a pakaliyav, ini sun a ’ali’ali.
ch: A:盡量吃喝，你又不是外人。
en: B: Try to eat and drink as much as possible, you’re not an outsider.

ab: liyav anga ku kinan, mavetu anga ken aravac.
ch: B:我吃了很多，已經非常飽了。
en: A: I ate a lot, I was very full.
B: Eat more, don’t be polite.
A:Well, it’s delicious.

ab: uri vaik anga ken, ku ljizavau anga sun nutjaivililj.
ch: A:我要離開了，下次再來看你。
en: A: I’m leaving, I’ll see you next time.
B: Okay, goodbye.

ab: salilim anga, vaik anga ken a tjumaq.
ch: A:已經很晚了，我要回家了。
en: A: It’s late, I’m going home.
B:Come again next time!
B: Walk slowly and carefully.

ab: ui, nu izua su zikang kelju anga a kivangavang.
en: A: Okay, come to my house sometime.
